nasb.text: Adoni-bezek said, “Seventy kings with their thumbs and their big toes cut off used to gather up scraps under my table; as I have done, so God has repaid me.” So they brought him to Jerusalem and he died there.

esv.text: And Adoni-bezek said, “Seventy kings with their thumbs and their big toes cut off used to pick up scraps under my table. As I have done, so God has repaid me.” And they brought him to Jerusalem, and he died there.

cnv.text: 比色王說：“從前有七十個王，手腳的大拇指都被我砍去，在我的桌子底下拾取食物；現在　神照著我所行的，報應我了。”於是他們把他帶到耶路撒冷，後來他就死在那裡。

ccb.text: 亚多尼·比色说：“从前七十个王的大拇指和大脚趾被我砍掉，在我桌下捡食物碎屑，现在上帝照我的行为报应我了。”他们把他带到耶路撒冷，他死在了那里。
